title: juglans × intermedia var. pyriformis
intro: Juglans × intermedia var. pyriformis, also known as the Chinese walnut, is a hybrid plant that belongs to the family Juglandaceae. It is known for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which are attributed to the presence of compounds such as juglone and tannins. The health benefits of Juglans × intermedia var. pyriformis include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant are often used to make teas, decoctions, and infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
